hero.title: Journey to the Living Eden
hero.subtitle: Small-group voyages through the Galapagos Islands, guided by naturalists and built around the wild rhythm of the archipelago.

home.featuredSubtitle: Hand-crafted itineraries for every kind of traveler.
home.whySubtitle: A calmer, deeper way to see the enchanted islands.

guides.title: Expert Naturalist Guides
guides.body: Licensed, bilingual guides who know every finch, tortoise, and current.

smallGroups.title: Small Groups
smallGroups.body: Intimate vessels and land stays keep the experience personal and low-impact.

conservation.title: Conservation First
conservation.body: We follow strict sustainability practices and support local communities.

flexibility.title: Flexible Itineraries
flexibility.body: Tailor your days to wildlife, photography, or pure rest.

home.contactSubtitle: Reach us on WhatsApp or WeChat, or browse packages to begin.
home.whatsappMsg: Hi! I am interested in a Galapagos voyage and would like to know more.

footer.text: Galapagos Voyages - responsible travel to the enchanted islands.

booking.title: Book your voyage
booking.choosePayment: Choose how you would like to pay.
booking.paymentUnavailable: Payment is not available for this booking.
booking.expired: Your reservation has expired. Start a new booking to hold your spot.

error.notEnoughSpots: Not enough spots left for the selected guests.
error.invalidGuests: Please choose a valid number of guests.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

packages.catalogIntro: Browse our curated small-group expeditions across the archipelago.
packages.bookNote: No payment required to reserve your spot.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Back-office for voyages, bookings and promotions.
admin.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
admin.name: Name

account.welcomeBack: Welcome back. Sign in to manage your voyages.
account.createAccount: Join to track bookings, invoices, and loyalty points.
account.name: Full name
account.loginError: We could not sign you in. Check your email and password.
account.registerError: An account with this email already exists.
account.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
account.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

chat.greeting: Hello! I am the Galapagos Voyages assistant. Ask me about trips, pricing, or the best time to visit, or leave your email and we will reach out.
chat.talkToHumanMsg: Hi! I was chatting on your website and would like to speak with someone about a Galapagos trip.
chat.fallback: Thanks for your message! For bookings, pricing, or travel advice, feel free to ask, or contact us on WhatsApp or WeChat.
chat.error: I could not reach the assistant just now. Please try again in a moment.
chat.retry: Message failed to send. Please try again.
chat.leadEmailPrompt: Leave your email and we will get back to you:
chat.thankYou: Thank you! We have your details and will be in touch soon.

contact.leadEmailPrompt: Leave your email and we will get back to you:
contact.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.contactIntro: Tell us about your dream Galapagos voyage and our team will help you plan it.
contact.followUpNote: We reply within one business day. You can also reach us on WhatsApp or WeChat.

seo.metaTitleHome: Galapagos Voyages - Small-Group Expeditions to the Enchanted Islands
seo.metaDescHome: Naturalist-guided, small-group voyages through the Galapagos Islands. Wildlife, conservation, and unforgettable itineraries.
seo.metaDescPackages: Browse curated small-group Galapagos expeditions: cruises, land stays, and diving adventures across the archipelago.

lead.leadSuccess: Thank you. We will be in touch shortly.
